task_description: Transform MK OS into a living autonomous AI that makes money from crypto trading, manages homelab infrastructure, syncs knowledge across all devices, develops mastery over skills, communicates via Telegram from phone, checks device resources before acting (never crashes), has Python automation scripts, proper Linux integration, and a massive knowledge base of 15,000+ facts. The Mind system provides goal-driven autonomy with Think-Act-Evaluate-Learn loops.

verification.summary: Build: 0 errors (10 cosmetic warnings). Tests: 40 passed, 0 failed, 316 assertions. Python: 12 scripts pass syntax check. Shell: 6 scripts pass bash -n. Knowledge: 15,007 facts loaded from 49 .mk files. 65 new/modified files, 21,600+ lines added. Semantic review v2: APPROVED. Security issues from v1 review all fixed (shell injection, auth bypass, HMAC validation, file permission checks).
